## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / macOS 14)
- **Python version**: (e.g., 3.11.4)
- **HoneyTrap AI version**: (run `honeytrap --version`)
- **Device profile**: (e.g., web_server, file_share)
- **AI mode**: (offline / openai / ollama)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `honeytrap --profile web_server`
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full traceback if applicable.
